docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $25.00) SERVED MAY-07-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUIRRE, ANTHONY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-15-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO HAVING A JUDGE PRO TEM HEARING THE CASE. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR THE CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY AGUIRRE, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-19-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
